titleStmt.title: SII 17.723: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 723. (A.R. No. 666 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
The provenance of this record so far to the north and its palaeography would point to the identity of the king with Sundarapāṇḍya I.

This records the gift of the proceeds from certain taxes like ūr-kaḍamai, āyam, peṟaśādavari etc. by the inhabitants (nāṭṭavar) of Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam and Īkkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam, for repairs, and unguents in the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, at Kāṉap pēṟūr-nāḍu, in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇ
ṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku puḻaṟ koṭṭattu nāṭṭavarum
Īkkāṭṭu koṭṭattu nāṭṭavarum Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tiruppaṇikkum cāttuppaṭi pūccuppaṭik kum Uṭalāka Iṭṭa tirumullaivā
yilil puṟakkalaṉai Iṟukkum palakalaṉaip perāl Ūrkaṭamai Āyamum maṉṟāṭikaḷ peṟacāta variyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭ
ṭa puṟakkalaṉaiyāl Uḷḷa varikaḷum sarvvamāṉiya Iṟaiyiliyāka cantirātittavarai celvatāka śilālekhai paṇṇikkuṭuttom
nāṭṭavarom Ivai paṇiyāl cittirameḻiveḷāṉ Eḻuttu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.723 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
